title: Tennessee DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Tennessee DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (TDHS Division of Rehabilitation Services DDS), examiner classification (Disability Claims Examiner) with class code not publicly accessible, estimated total compensation ($75,813–$79,699; ~$26.17/hr) from Glassdoor/Salary.com, supervisor estimate (~$74,705), right-to-work non-bargaining status, blocked AlphaCompPlan PDF, the state salary-search tool, and gaps. Markdown-only state (no sibling scheduled-rates.json).

source.publisher: Tennessee Department of Human Resources (TDHR); TN Dept of Human Services (TDHS) Division of Rehabilitation Services DDS
source.title: TN DDS salary research notes (AlphaCompPlan PDF blocked; Glassdoor/Salary.com estimates)

update_cadence: ad hoc (estimates); state comp plan published periodically
notes: Computed: agency and examiner title (Disability Claims Examiner) confirmed, but class codes and pay grades are not publicly published; salary figures are Glassdoor/Salary.com estimates ($75,813–$79,699 examiner; ~$74,705 supervisor). The AlphaCompPlan PDF and class-spec PDFs were blocked from extraction; an interactive salary-search tool exists. Right-to-work — no collective bargaining. Market data currency ~Dec 2024 → temporal_coverage. No sibling scheduled-rates.json for TN.
